# Sienna Ridge Homes — Southwest Las Vegas Real Estate

> Dr. Jan Duffy is a licensed Spring Valley real estate agent (Nevada S.0197614.LLC) specializing in buyer representation across Southwest Las Vegas zip codes 89117, 89147, and 89148.

- Buyer representation for families, investors, and first-time home buyers
